name: ERPNext Stock V2 Repack Manufacturing Test

parameters.dataJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ item_group_name: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.itemGroup, parent_item_group: "All Item Groups", is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.finishedWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawA, item_name: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawA, item_group: $node["Create Repack Item Group"].json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 0, valuation_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawARate, standard_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawARate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawB, item_name: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawB, item_group: $node["Create Repack Item Group"].json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 0, valuation_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawBRate, standard_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawBRate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.finished, item_name: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.finished, item_group: $node["Create Repack Item Group"].json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 0, is_sales_item: 1, valuation_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.finishedRate, standard_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.finishedRate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Receipt", company: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.postingDate, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Repack Raw A Item"].json.name, t_warehouse: $node["Create Repack Raw Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.receiptRawA, basic_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawARate }, { item_code: $node["Create Repack Raw B Item"].json.name, t_warehouse: $node["Create Repack Raw Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.receiptRawB, basic_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawBRate }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Repack", company: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.postingDate, from_warehouse: $node["Create Repack Raw Warehouse"].json.name, to_warehouse: $node["Create Repack Finished Warehouse"].json.name, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Repack Raw A Item"].json.name, s_warehouse: $node["Create Repack Raw Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.consumeRawA, basic_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawARate }, { item_code: $node["Create Repack Raw B Item"].json.name, s_warehouse: $node["Create Repack Raw Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.consumeRawB, basic_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.rawBRate }, { item_code: $node["Create Repack Finished Item"].json.name, t_warehouse: $node["Create Repack Finished Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.finishedQty, basic_rate: $node["Build Repack Context"].json.finishedRate, is_finished_item: 1 }] }) }}

parameters.filtersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Create Repack Raw A Item"].json.name, warehouse: $node["Create Repack Raw Warehouse"].json.name }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Create Repack Raw B Item"].json.name, warehouse: $node["Create Repack Raw Warehouse"].json.name }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Create Repack Finished Item"].json.name, warehouse: $node["Create Repack Finished Warehouse"].json.name }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ voucher_type: "Stock Entry", voucher_no: $node["Create Repack Stock Entry"].json.name }) }}
